main.description: A quest, mission, bounty, or challenge with a lifecycle, for use in a play record's `state` array. Cardinality: keyed — unique per ($type, id); writers upsert by `id`.

id.description: Stable, game-defined identifier for this objective. Language-independent and consistent across play-throughs & game versions.

name.description: Human-readable display name in the locale active at write time. Optional, but recommended so renderers without a localised mapping of `id` can fall back to displaying this.

status.description: Where this objective is in its lifecycle.

current.description: Progress towards `target` for step-counted objectives (eg. 7 of 10 wolves).

target.description: The step count at which this objective completes.

acceptedAt.description: Wall-clock time the objective became active.

resolvedAt.description: Wall-clock time the objective reached a terminal status (completed, failed, or abandoned).

items.description: Game-specific lexicons that can hold additional information about this objective.
